label: unconventional_headers_what_i_do_career
resume_text:
JAMES OKAFOR — Denials & Appeals Analyst
jokafor@email.com  •  Atlanta, GA

What I Do
I turn payer denials into recovered revenue, writing clinical and technical appeals that overturn CO-45, CO-97, and medical-necessity denials at scale.

Career
Denials Analyst, Peachtree Regional (2020-Present)
- Overturned $3.1M in denied claims through structured second-level appeals.
- Built a denial-reason taxonomy that cut repeat denials by 34%.
Appeals Coordinator, Grady Billing Office (2017-2020)
- Drafted 60+ appeal letters weekly with a 71% overturn rate.

Toolbox
Waystar · Availity · CARC/RARC codes · medical necessity appeals · root-cause analysis
